content:
- Completed the primary/replicas connection-helper task end to end: new CLI commands, shared sampled-cluster snapshot, DSN rendering, TLS path provenance, docs, binary tests, and one live HA switchover e2e scenario.
- Rebuilt docs and passed the required gates: make check, make test, make test-long, and make lint.
- Ran .ralph/task_switch.sh after setting the task file to completed with <passes>true</passes>; next step is only to commit all changes and push.
